name: Iced Strawberry Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh strawberries, washed, hulled, and dried
1 medium English cucumber, peeled and cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place strawberries in a food processor fitted with a steel blade; puree.
2. Pour the pureed strawberries into a large bowl and set aside.
3. In the same food processor, add cucumber chunks, yogurt, rum, chopped mint leaves, and sugar. Process until all ingredients are fully pureed.
4. Pour the pureed mixture into the bowl with the strawberry puree and stir to combine well.
5. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Serve ice cold, garnished with sprigs of mint and lemon slices.
7. Makes 4 cups.
Origin: Appeal (quarterly publication from Overwaitea Foods)
Shared by: Sharon Stevens.
